subject: [PATCH v5 15/36] mm/ksm: skip KSM for managed-memory folios

2026-07-20.patch_summary: This patch modifies the kernel's KSM (Kernel Samepage Merging) functionality to skip merging and scanning operations for private memory folios, which are intended for explicit placement. This change prevents KSM from operating on private node folios by default, thus maintaining the purpose of private memory. The modification uses a filter location similar to that used for zone_device folios.
